name: Waste log
description: Daily log for waste incidents, likely causes, and the next correction so recurring prep loss becomes visible enough to fix.
source_ref: core-v2: loss visibility should feed learning and action, not passive record-keeping
usage_moment: Use at end of day or after meaningful waste events to support a short loss review.
expected_output: A dated waste record with cause notes, pattern tags, and the next corrective action.
